name: APT Campaign Tracking
description: Tracks Advanced Persistent Threat campaigns by correlating incoming IOCs against known APT group indicators and TTPs. When a new threat intel alert arrives, the playbook extracts indicators, enriches them via VirusTotal and MISP, then uses AI-powered correlation to map indicators to known APT campaigns. Confirmed campaign matches trigger automatic blocklist updates, an endpoint sweep for related IOCs, and a detailed campaign tracking report distributed to the threat intel team. Unmatched indicators are added to a watchlist for continued monitoring.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: VirusTotal
required_integrations.reason: Enrich IOCs with detection ratios, campaign tags, and threat actor attribution data

required_integrations.name: MISP
required_integrations.reason: Correlate indicators against MISP galaxy clusters and known APT campaign databases

required_integrations.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
required_integrations.reason: Sweep endpoints for IOCs associated with confirmed APT campaigns

config.description: Triggers when an APT-related threat intelligence alert is ingested containing indicators potentially linked to advanced threat campaigns

config.code:
import re

alert = inputs.get('alert', {})
raw_text = str(alert)

ip_pattern = r'\b(?:\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}\b'
domain_pattern = r'\b(?:[a-zA-Z0-9-]+\.)+[a-zA-Z]{2,}\b'
sha256_pattern = r'\b[a-fA-F0-9]{64}\b'
md5_pattern = r'\b[a-fA-F0-9]{32}\b'

ips = list(set(re.findall(ip_pattern, raw_text)))
domains = list(set(re.findall(domain_pattern, raw_text)))
hashes = list(set(re.findall(sha256_pattern, raw_text) + re.findall(md5_pattern, raw_text)))

indicators = []
for ip in ips:
    indicators.append({'type': 'ip', 'value': ip})
for d in domains:
    indicators.append({'type': 'domain', 'value': d})
for h in hashes:
    indicators.append({'type': 'hash', 'value': h})

campaign_hint = alert.get('campaign_name', alert.get('threat_group', 'Unknown'))

result = {
    'indicators': indicators,
    'total_count': len(indicators),
    'campaign_hint': campaign_hint,
    'source_alert_id': alert.get('id', 'N/A')
}
config.description: Extracts all IOCs from the alert and captures any existing campaign attribution hints for correlation
Enriches all extracted indicators against VirusTotal and MISP to gather detection ratios, campaign tags, and threat group associations

config.additional_instructions: Map all enriched indicators to known APT campaigns and threat groups. Identify MITRE ATT&CK techniques, infrastructure overlaps, and campaign timelines. Determine confidence level of campaign attribution.
config.description: AI-powered analysis correlating enriched IOCs against known APT campaigns, identifying TTPs and campaign timelines
Routes based on whether AI correlation confirmed a match to a known APT campaign with sufficient confidence
Adds all confirmed campaign IOCs to the APT campaign blocklist for automated blocking across perimeter controls
Initiates an endpoint-wide sweep via CrowdStrike to detect systems communicating with confirmed APT campaign infrastructure

config.additional_instructions: Generate a detailed APT campaign tracking report including campaign timeline, affected infrastructure, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, and recommended defensive actions. Include IOC counts, confidence levels, and attribution details.
config.description: AI-generated campaign tracking report with full attribution details, ATT&CK mapping, and defensive recommendations

notify.subject: APT CAMPAIGN TRACKING: {{analyze_2.campaign_name}} — {{code_1.outputs.result.total_count}} IOCs Confirmed

config.description: Distributes the campaign tracking report to the threat intel team with full details and response actions taken
Documents unmatched indicators and adds them to a watchlist for continued monitoring and future correlation
